name: Ashland Parks and Recreation
description: Ashland Parks and Recreation is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ashland, WI. There are 2 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Bretting Community Center
description: Bretting Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ashland, WI. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.
open_play_schedule: Monday, Tuesday, Thursday schedule for women only
